summary: Code review and verification of Onboarding Guide feature. This is an Expo/React Native mobile app - onboarding only renders in mobile app (not web browser). The web version at /api/web shows a separate React web app with login page. Code review confirms all onboarding features are correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Onboarding has 4 slides defined in ONBOARDING_SLIDES array (lines 19-73 in onboarding.tsx)
✓ Each slide has: title, subtitle, description, example card (label/value/detail), and external image
✓ All 4 images are accessible (HTTP 200) from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com
✓ 'Hoppa över' (Skip) button at top right - calls handleSkip() which goes to login (lines 91-93, 109-111)
✓ 'Nästa' (Next) button advances to next slide via handleNext() (lines 83-89, 169-182)
✓ 'Kom igång!' (Get Started) button shown on last slide (slide 4) - goes to login (line 175)
✓ Premium badge with star icon and 'PREMIUM' text appears on slide 4 (Agda AI) via isPremium: true flag (lines 71, 135-140)
✓ AsyncStorage checks onboarding completion with key '@honsgarden_onboarding_complete' (index.tsx lines 7, 17-24)
✓ New users see onboarding before login (index.tsx lines 36-38)
✓ Settings has 'Visa introduktion' button with book icon (settings.tsx lines 783-795)
✓ handleShowOnboarding() removes AsyncStorage key and navigates to /onboarding (settings.tsx lines 290-297)
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is an Expo/React Native mobile app. The onboarding feature is ONLY accessible in the mobile app (Expo Go or native build), NOT in web browser. The web version at /api/web is a separate React web app. To fully test onboarding UI interactions, use Expo Go app on physical device/simulator. Code review confirms all 7 requested features are correctly implemented.

onboarding_4_slides_with_images.details: ONBOARDING_SLIDES array with 4 slides, each with image URL pointing to static.prod-images.emergentagent.com. All images return HTTP 200.

slide_content_structure.details: Each slide has title, subtitle, description, and example object (label, value, detail)

next_button_navigation.details: handleNext() increments currentIndex, button shows 'Nästa' text with arrow-forward icon

skip_button_to_login.details: handleSkip() calls completeOnboarding() which saves to AsyncStorage and navigates to /(auth)/login

last_slide_get_started_button.details: Button text changes to 'Kom igång!' when currentIndex === ONBOARDING_SLIDES.length - 1, with checkmark icon

settings_show_introduction_button.details: 'Visa introduktion' button calls handleShowOnboarding() which removes AsyncStorage key and navigates to /onboarding

premium_badge_on_ai_slide.details: Slide 4 (Agda AI) has isPremium: true, which renders a PREMIUM badge with star icon and text

slides_content.title: Välkommen till Hönsgården!

slides_content.description: Håll koll på ägg, hönor och ekonomi på ett enkelt sätt.
slides_content.example_card: Exempel: Dagens ägg - 24 ägg - Registrera med ett tryck!

slides_content.description: Skapa profiler med namn, ras, ålder och egenskaper.
slides_content.example_card: Exempel: Din flock - 12 hönor - 🐔 Greta, Selma, Astrid...

slides_content.title: Se dina resultat
slides_content.subtitle: Statistik och trender
slides_content.description: Följ produktionen över tid med grafer och rapporter.

slides_content.title: Träffa Agda
slides_content.subtitle: Din AI-rådgivare
slides_content.description: Få personliga tips, prognoser och svar på dina frågor.
slides_content.example_card: Agda säger: - ☀️ Perfekt väder! - Förväntad produktion: 28 ägg
